title: nectandra puberula
intro:
Nectandra puberula is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, commonly known as the "Palo de Cristal" or "Crystal Tree," which is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nectandra puberula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
